description: Layer-2 evals for the Classifier deep module. Each case provides a redacted Review + Business profile; the runner calls `classify()` and grades the structured output. We deliberately do NOT assert on the exact `suggested_reply` string — LLM nondeterminism makes that brittle — we assert on `is_incident`, `severity`, sentiment, and required `themes` overlap. See ../README.md for how to run.

evals.prompt: Best bakery in town! The staff are friendly and the pastries are perfect. [REVIEWER] always remembers my order.
evals.expected_output: Non-incident, positive sentiment, service/product_quality themes, neutral-warm reply.

assertions.description: themes includes at least one of "service" or "product_quality"
suggested_reply length is between 1 and 500 characters

evals.prompt: Waited 25 minutes for a sandwich. Food was fine but the wait was rough. Probably won't come back at lunch.
Food was good overall but one of the staff used a racial slur at the table next to ours. 4 stars only because the food itself was fine.
evals.expected_output: Incident at high severity (ADR-0002: content, not stars). staff_attitude theme. Apology-and-investigate reply that does not promise specific discipline.

assertions.description: suggested_reply does not invent a specific discount, refund amount, or firing commitment

evals.prompt: I got severe food poisoning after eating here — was vomiting all night. There was a hair in my soup too.
evals.expected_output: Incident at high severity. cleanliness and/or product_quality themes.

assertions.description: themes includes at least one of "cleanliness" or "product_quality"

evals.prompt: An elderly customer collapsed in the cafe and the staff did nothing — we had to call an ambulance ourselves. The manager refused to help.
evals.expected_output: Incident at high severity. staff_attitude or accessibility or service themes.

assertions.description: themes includes at least one of "staff_attitude", "accessibility", or "service"

evals.prompt: Oh wonderful, another 45 minutes for a coffee! Truly a delightful experience as always.
evals.expected_output: Negative sentiment despite positive surface words. wait_time theme.

evals.prompt: ¡Qué experiencia tan maravillosa! La comida estaba deliciosa y el personal fue muy amable. Volveré pronto.

assertions.description: suggested_reply is written in Spanish to match the Review language

evals.expected_output: Edge case: no text, just stars. Should still produce a valid Classification, almost certainly non-incident and themed "other".

evals.prompt: Came in with my service dog and was asked to leave. Manager apologised when I explained but the staff member was rude.
evals.expected_output: Edge case: accessibility incident at medium severity (resolved on-site but staff training gap), accessibility + staff_attitude themes.
